_comment: MCP backend registry. Canonical location: ~/.fcc/mcp_config.json. Edit via the Admin UI → MCP Router view (recommended) or by hand. Copy this file to ~/.fcc/mcp_config.json and fill in real secrets. The launcher creates this automatically on first run. Each stdio MCP server is exposed by supergateway on http://127.0.0.1:<port>/sse. The meta-router reads this to know which backends exist and what command to spawn.
